name: Access & roles

entities: Role { id, name, description, member_count, is_system }

customization_points: the permission catalog (defaults to the app's own capability set)
whether roles are fixed (system) or customer-editable
role→user assignment lives here or on the user-management detail screen
notes: v0.1: manifest + roles-list/permission-matrix design mockup. Code template pending SOF-109's template-framework decision. Pairs with user-management (assign-role can live on either); see docs/design/component-library.md.
